steps.title: Use the target expression directly
steps.content: The expression asks for $3x-12$, and the problem already tells you $3x=30$. Do not solve for $x$ unless you need to.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: $18$ is correct. Using $x-12$, $x+12$, or $3x+12$ would change the expression the question asks for instead of substituting $3x=30$ into $3x-12$.
